steps.title: Identify the unit rate
steps.content: We are given that the product costs \$11.00 per pound. This is the unit rate — the cost per unit quantity.

steps.title: Calculate total cost by scaling the unit rate
steps.content:
To find the cost for 6 pounds, multiply the unit rate by the quantity:
$$11 \times 6 = 66$$
The cost for 6 pounds is \$66.00.
